name: MarkdownViewer
description: A widget for rendering markdown-formatted text into styled HTML content with support for headers, lists, code blocks, tables, and more

configOptions.name: enableSanitization
configOptions.label: Enable HTML Sanitization
configOptions.description: Enable HTML sanitization to prevent XSS attacks. When enabled, HTML tags in the markdown will be escaped

configOptions.name: showLineNumbers
configOptions.label: Show Line Numbers
configOptions.description: Display line numbers alongside the rendered content. Useful for code documentation or technical content

configOptions.name: theme
configOptions.label: Theme
configOptions.description: Visual theme for the markdown viewer (default, light, or dark)

configOptions.name: onContentChange
configOptions.label: On Content Change
configOptions.description: Triggered when the markdown content is rendered or updated
